pages.title: Nutrigetic – Life is now! Take care of your wellness today.
pages.meta_description: Nutrigetic offers practical wellness solutions, diet consultations, and logistics changes for a healthier life. Explore our BMI calculator, lifestyle blogs, and nutritional juices.
headings: H3: Practical solutions and logistic changes are what we focus on!

h3: Practical solutions and logistic changes are what we focus on!

missing_meta: Missing meta description tags on the live site
weak_headings: H3 'Contact Us' seems disconnected from a parent H2 concept
seo_gaps: H1 'Life is Now' is inspiring but not SEO-optimized for target keywords like 'Nutritionist' or 'Wellness Consulting'

pages.title: Blog – Nutrigetic
pages.meta_description: Read the Nutrigetic blog for healthy recipes, nutrition tips, and recovery drinks like beetroot and milk to boost your wellness journey.

missing_meta: Missing meta description tags on the live site
weak_headings: H2s represent individual posts but lack an overarching introductory section
seo_gaps: Needs an H1 targeting 'Nutrition & Wellness Blog' or 'Nutrigetic Articles'. Description should be added.

pages.title: Water Melon Juice – Recipe – Nutrigetic
pages.meta_description: Try this refreshing and healthy watermelon juice recipe by Nutrigetic. Perfect for summer coolant and daily wellness routines.

missing_meta: Missing meta description tags on the live site
weak_headings: Missing H1 completely. Main title 'WATER MELON JUICE RECIPE' is formatted as H2 rather than H1.
seo_gaps: Recipe pages should use H1 for the recipe name and should ideally include recipe schema markup.

pages.title: Cucumber Juice – Nutrigetic
pages.meta_description: Refresh your day with our simple and nutritious cucumber juice recipe from Nutrigetic. Discover the health benefits of this hydrating coolant.

missing_meta: Missing meta description tags on the live site
weak_headings: Missing H1 entirely. 'Cucumber Juice' is an H2 but should be an H1.
seo_gaps: Missing H1 tag. Needs meta description added and schema markup for recipes.

global_issues: No meta descriptions are present across any of the crawled pages
Empty or non-existent H1 tags on subpages (Blog and Recipe pages)
Inconsistent protocol usage (HTTP vs HTTPS used in internal links, e.g., 'http://www.nutrigetic.com/water-melon-juice-recipe/')
Blog categories use 'uncategorized' in the URL structure ('/uncategorized/beetroot/'), missing SEO value
Homepage H1 'Life is Now' lacks specific SEO target keywords.
